title: Feature Requests for Calendar View

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I spend most of my time in the Monthly Calendar and have a couple of feature requests:

1 - Add a way to duplicate items from that view. I can edit and move them, but not duplicate. “Duplicate Item” should be added to the contextual menu.

2 - Show some indication of the time of an event on this view (like in the weekly view). Options could include adding the time in parentheses to the end of the title, or preceding the event title with a time.

What are you trying to achieve

Add features to the monthly calendar view to make it more useful.
